description_for_human: 2885+ privacy-first, offline, single-file web tools — games, simulations, AI tools, creative, productivity, and more.
description_for_model: Discover and open LocalFirst Tools: 2885+ single-file, offline-first browser apps. Fetch the catalog at the api url, search apps[] by title/description/tags/category, and return each tool's live `url`. Zero-server, no auth.
